name: Groucho Marx
abstract: Julius Henry "Groucho" Marx (; October 2, 1890 – August 19, 1977) was an American comedian, actor, comic vocalist and game show host who performed in vaudeville, Broadway, films, radio, and television. A master of the one-line retort, he is considered one of America's greatest comedians.

about_quotes.speaker: Patricia Willard
about_quotes.evidence: The interviewee mentions 'Groucho Marx Show' only as the name of a television program where he worked, with no indication of a personal relationship with Groucho Marx himself.

about_quotes.speaker: Dorothy Donegan
about_quotes.evidence: And Groucho Marx. He says, “Oh, you ain’t drawing, these women are drawing” I said, “You’ll see.”
about_quotes.doc_title: Dorothy Donegan — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
